summary: Shopping Cart and Guest Checkout flow tested end-to-end. All 12 features working correctly: E-Shop add to cart, cart display with prices, quantity update, remove item, clear cart, guest info validation, create account option, payment page demo, booking confirmation, auto account creation with credentials display, user login, and dashboard with bookings.

eshop_add_to_cart.details: View Details modal opens with product info, quantity controls, Add to Cart button works, cart icon shows count badge

shopping_cart_display.details: Cart page shows item name, image, type badge (Product/Stay/Activity), price ₹899, quantity controls, GST 12% calculation, Order Summary sidebar

cart_quantity_update.details: Increase/decrease quantity buttons work for products, total price updates correctly

cart_remove_item.details: Remove (trash) button visible on each cart item, item removed when clicked

cart_clear_entire_cart.details: Clear Cart button visible, clears all items from cart when clicked

checkout_guest_form_validation.details: Full Name, Email, Phone required fields with validation. Form shows error messages for empty/invalid fields

checkout_create_account_checkbox.details: Create an account checkbox visible with descriptive text explaining credentials will be sent via email. Checked by default

checkout_payment_page_demo.details: Payment step shows Demo Mode notice, Credit/Debit Card, UPI Payment, Net Banking options with radio buttons

checkout_confirm_booking.details: Confirm Booking creates booking records with Order ID (ORD-2026-XXXXX) and Booking Reference (BK-2026-XXXX), shows Total Amount

checkout_auto_create_account.details: Confirmation page shows 'Your Account Has Been Created!' with email and generated password credentials

user_dashboard_login.details: Login modal with email/password fields, Login button, error handling for invalid credentials

user_dashboard_bookings.details: Dashboard shows user profile, stats (Total Bookings, Upcoming, Completed, Total Spent), My Bookings tab with booking cards showing item name, status badge, reference, dates, guests, amount, payment status

test_credentials.note: New accounts created during checkout receive auto-generated passwords shown on confirmation page

seed_data_creation: Backend API tests created multiple test users and bookings during checkout flow tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopping cart and checkout flow fully functional. Cart uses session ID stored in localStorage. Checkout creates bookings and optionally creates user accounts with auto-generated passwords. User Dashboard shows booking history for logged-in users. Test user john.doe@example.com with password 50LYonwX has 1 confirmed booking for Tiger & Tusker Suite.
